decision.summary: No new action: with only 4 hours left in the daily session, the active daily 77k dip and the weekly 80k reach are the only live expressions left, and there is no clean new edge to add.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77624.29, still close to the session low with shorts dominant and no fresh open-interest expansion. The account already holds the active daily 77k dip around 27% and the active weekly 80k reach around 21%, while the old daily 79k reach and the old weekly 72k dip are both correctly marked as discarded_for_slot. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. At this point only 4 hours remain until daily expiry, so new same-day entries must be especially clean. They are not: 77k dip is already the nearest bearish daily and is already live, while the remaining daily strikes are either too weak or too late to matter materially. The nearest upside daily, 79k reach, has fallen to about 6%, so it is not a credible same-day momentum trade anymore. On the weekly board, the next upside strike, 82k reach, is only about 3.15%, too weak to justify a second weekly slot. The correct action is to hold the existing active daily and weekly positions and avoid opening anything new into a nearly finished daily session.
